top_signals.title: Luxury stocks spike on proposed U.S.-Iran peace deal; LVMH up 5%
top_signals.summary: Luxury stocks have been hard hit by the Iran war, as the Middle East had been a fast-growing market for the otherwise largely muted sector.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Germany to Grow in 2026 as Spending Offsets War, Bundesbank Says
top_signals.summary: Germany’s economy will recover more slowly than expected because of the Iran war but pick up steam in the coming years thanks to fiscal stimulus, according to the Bundesbank.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board announces final rule that establishes data standards for certain information collections
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board announces final rule that establishes data standards for certain information collections
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Korean Stocks Jump as Iran Deal Hopes Spark Chip Stock Rally
top_signals.summary: South Korean stocks jumped as investors piled back into the country’s chipmakers after President Donald Trump signaled a potential deal with Iran, boosting risk sentiment.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: In a first, consumer consultations in Japan about social media top 100,000
top_signals.summary: Those in their 50s and older accounted for more than half of the total social media-related consultations to consumer affairs centers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
